chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-1494 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 25.03.2026. Mr. Zaheer Ahmed Ansari, Advocate for applicant/accused. Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State. ***************************************** Learned counsel for the applicant/accused submits that the parties have patched up before the learned Trial Court, therefore, under instructions, he does not press the instant Bail Application. Accordingly, the Bail Application stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Ali.
